rule.statement: Routine MUST complete in 15 minutes; longer routines rejected.
rule.rationale: Anything longer doesn't survive busy weeks.

rule.statement: Checklist MUST cover the 5 items: fields complete, stage moves recorded, hot-opp next-step, loss reasons, source tags.
rule.rationale: Five items capture pipeline-rot modes; more dilute focus.

rule.statement: Every hot opp (close <30d) MUST have a named next-step + owner + by-when.
rule.rationale: Hot opps lose because nobody pushes; named next-step prevents drift.

rule.statement: Every closed-lost opp MUST be tagged with reason from a bounded enum (price, fit, timing, competitor, no_decision).
rule.rationale: Without enum, loss data is unreadable; with enum, win/loss reviews work.

rule.statement: Every new opp MUST be tagged with source channel; untagged sources are rejected.
rule.rationale: Source data drives marketing spend allocation.
